content.text: All files are in place. Let me do a quick sanity check on the updated App.tsx:

Everything looks correct. TypeScript check passed with zero errors.

Here is a summary of what was built:

---

## Admin Panel - Summary

### Files created

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/c/Users/flori/src/techbyflo/api/admin/login.ts` | POST handler — validates password with timing-safe comparison, sets HttpOnly cookie with HMAC-signed token |
| `/c/Users/flori/src/techbyflo/api/admin/logout.ts` | POST handler — clears the admin cookie |
| `/c/Users/flori/src/techbyflo/api/admin/maintenance.ts` | GET/POST handler — reads/writes `site:maintenance` in Vercel KV, requires valid auth cookie |
| `/c/Users/flori/src/techbyflo/api/status.ts` | Public GET endpoint — returns `{ maintenance: boolean }` for the frontend check, no-store cache headers |
| `/c/Users/flori/src/techbyflo/client/src/pages/admin.tsx` | Standalone admin UI (dark theme, #0F2438/#FFD400) with login form + maintenance toggle dashboard |

### Files modified

- `/c/Users/flori/src/techbyflo/client/src/App.tsx` — added `useLocation` + maintenance redirect effect on mount, and the `/admin` route

### Security properties

- Cookie: `HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=Strict; Max-Age=86400`
- Password comparison uses `timingSafeEqual` to prevent timing attacks
- Token is a base64url payload + HMAC-SHA256 signature, with expiry checked server-side
- All secrets come from `process.env` (`ADMIN_PASSWORD`, `ADMIN_JWT_SECRET`) — never hardcoded

### Required environment variables to add in Vercel

```
ADMIN_PASSWORD=<your-admin-password>
ADMIN_JWT_SECRET=<a-long-random-string>
KV_REST_API_URL=<from-vercel-kv-dashboard>
KV_REST_API_TOKEN=<from-vercel-kv-dashboard>
```
